title: Spicy Gooey Adventurous Vietnamese Leek Stir-fry
description: This adventurous take on a traditional Vietnamese dish features leeks cooked sous-vide to perfection and served with a spicy kick for an extra adventure.

ingredients.name: 1 pack of leeks
ingredients.notes: Ensure leeks are fresh and tender.

ingredients.name: 1/2 tsp salt
ingredients.notes: Enhances the flavors without overpowering them.

ingredients.name: 1/4 tsp black pepper
ingredients.notes: Adds a spicy twist to your stir-fry.

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp sriracha or other hot sauce
Vegetable oil for stir-frying
ingredients.notes: Choose a light neutral oil like avocado or canola oil.

instructions: Preheat your sous-vide machine to 130°F (54°C) and place leeks in the bag, ensuring they are well-sealed.
Cook the leeks for about 6 hours until tender. Let them cool down before proceeding with preparation.
Mince the garlic finely. In a wok or large skillet, add oil and heat over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic to the hot pan, stirring continuously to avoid burning, then gently fold in cooled leeks.
Mix soy sauce, lime juice, salt, and pepper with sriracha into a small bowl and pour it over the leeks in the wok.
Stir until everything is well combined and heated through. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot as an appetizer or side dish for an unforgettable culinary adventure.
